violations.text: Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Specifically, per observation and per PIC, staff do not sanitize donut trays. Inspectors informed PIC that trays must be sanitized. Inspectors demonstrated proper setup up sanitizer in the 3-bay sink at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Wood is used in the construction of table trip in the donut production area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement to customers informing them to notify employees if they have a food allergen. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Specifically, per observation and per PIC, staff do not sanitize donut trays. Inspectors informed PIC that trays must be sanitized. Inspectors demonstrated proper setup up sanitizer in the 3-bay sink at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Specifically, some bottles of surface cleaning chemicals were not labeled. Working containers of chemicals are to be labeled. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back staff entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Door to be made tight-fitting. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025
Bags of flour were observed stored under a bug light. Food to be relocated as to not expose product to contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2025
A mixing bowl located in the donut production area was not in good repair. Mixing bowl to be repaired before next use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

Wood is used in the construction in the donut production area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Wood strips along the sides and back of donut production area to be replaced with hardwood or other material that is smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Duct tape was observed on a stand mixer. Duct tape to be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizer sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
